title: CAT Mission Package
description: Review-ready output bundle produced for one mission: metadata, BEADs, evidence refs, and next steps.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of package assembly.

mission_id.description: Canonical mission identifier, or null when no mission is active.

mission_title.description: Human-readable mission title from the contract or registry.

mission_status.description: Mission status string (e.g. active, closed, abandoned).

beads.description: Ordered list of BEADs belonging to this mission.

total.description: Total number of BEADs in this mission.

terminal.description: Number of BEADs in any terminal status (completed, failed, archived).

evidence_refs.description: Relative paths to declared BEAD evidence files that exist on disk.

next_steps.description: Hint strings describing what remains to be done.
